commands.argv: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m unittest discover -s tests -v
commands.summary: 59 stdlib tests passed; OpenCode adapter tests are targeted because parent adapter test directory is outside the WS-13 write set.

commands.argv: PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m agent_lifecycle audit ownership --manifest plans/standalone-v1/plan.manifest.json --base main --path adapters/opencode --path conformance/adapters/opencode --path tests/adapters/opencode --path plans/standalone-v1/evidence/ws-13 --fail-on-unowned --fail-on-forbidden
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=src python -m agent_lifecycle.neutrality scan --scope current-tree-complete --policy policy/neutrality.policy.json --require-zero-findings
commands.summary: Current tree neutrality scan passed with zero findings.

commands.argv: rg -n "project markers" adapters/opencode conformance/adapters/opencode tests/adapters/opencode || true
commands.summary: No source-project markers found in OpenCode adapter files.

summary: WS-13 adds OpenCode EXPERIMENTAL offline adapter projection without duplicating lifecycle core semantics.
